name: Glycinate Magnesium Complex
summary: Glycinate Magnesium Complex is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Sleep; Cognition; Stress Response; Neurobiology. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Neurotransmitter Modulation; Stress Response Modulation, not treatment claims.
description: Glycinate Magnesium Complex is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Sleep; Cognition; Stress Response; Neurobiology. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Neurotransmitter Modulation; Stress Response Modulation, not treatment claims.
contraindications: Avoid high-dose magnesium with kidney disease
buying_criteria: Glycinate for sleep/anxiety or threonate for cognition
